title: Calories Burned Walking 5 Miles (Outdoor and Treadmill Estimates)
introduction: Walking 5 miles is a strong calorie-burning workout. Here are realistic calorie ranges by body weight, plus the difference between flat walking and incline walking.

sections.heading: 🚶‍♀️ Quick Answer: 5 Miles Walking Calories
sections.content:
| Body Weight | Flat 5 Miles | Moderate Incline 5 Miles |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 280-360 kcal | 360-460 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 350-450 kcal | 450-570 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 420-540 kcal | 540-690 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 490-630 kcal | 630-810 kcal |

Use the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator) for your specific speed, incline, and body weight.

sections.heading: How Long Does It Take to Walk 5 Miles?
sections.content:
| Pace | Time for 5 Miles |
| --- | --- |
| 20 min/mile | ~100 minutes |
| 18 min/mile | ~90 minutes |
| 16 min/mile | ~80 minutes |
| 15 min/mile | ~75 minutes |

Longer duration helps total calorie burn, but consistency across the week matters most.

sections.heading: Treadmill vs Outdoor 5-Mile Walk
sections.content:
Outdoor walking can burn slightly more due to terrain and wind resistance.

| Condition | Burn Impact |
| --- | --- |
| Flat treadmill, no incline | Baseline |
| Treadmill, 1-3% incline | +10-25% |
| Outdoor hills + uneven terrain | +10-30% |

If you walk indoors, adding incline is the easiest way to increase calorie burn safely.

sections.heading: How to Use This Number in Your Deficit Plan
sections.content:
Treat the walk as a predictable activity block in your weekly plan.

• Set your calorie target first
• Use 5-mile walks as consistent output
• Track weight trend every 7 days

Log all meals and workouts in Eati so your actual intake aligns with your exercise effort.

midArticleCta: Run your exact 5-mile walking burn with the calculator and track daily intake in Eati for better fat-loss accuracy.
conclusion: Walking 5 miles can burn meaningful calories, especially with incline or hills. Combine realistic burn estimates with consistent food tracking in Eati to turn walks into measurable fat-loss progress.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Walking 5 Miles: Table by Weight and Pace
metaDescription: Find calories burned walking 5 miles with practical tables by body weight, pace, and incline. Compare treadmill and outdoor walking burn.

faqs.question: Is walking 5 miles daily too much?
faqs.answer: For many people it is sustainable if progression is gradual and recovery is adequate. Increase distance slowly if you are new to walking volume.

faqs.question: Does incline walking burn much more than flat walking?
faqs.answer: Yes. Even a mild incline usually raises calorie burn by about 10-25% compared with flat walking at the same pace.
